latest_release.name: P(Doom)1 v0.12.0 -- friends & family alpha
latest_release.body:
The friends-and-family alpha of **P(Doom)1** -- a turn-based AI-safety strategy game where you run a frontier AI lab and try to steer the world's p(doom) before it steers you.

## The loop
Play a run, lose (you will), and your score posts to a **live global leaderboard** -- your name lands next to everyone else brave enough to try.

## New in this build
- The game reaches the leaderboard without crashing (that one took a while).
- A first-launch welcome overlay + a "Show gameplay hints" toggle for fresh players.
- Icons on the PLAN action categories.
- 7x smaller download than the old build.

## Play it (Windows)
1. Download `PDoom-v0.12.0-windows.zip` below.
2. Extract the whole folder (keep the files together).
3. Run `PDoom.exe`.

## Notes
- Early alpha -- expect rough edges. That is what you are here for.
- Windows only for now (Steam + web later).
- Found a bug or broke something interesting? Tell Pip.
